pages.text: Circles consume Crystal Mana (CM) to operate. 1 Magic Crystal = 1 CM.$(br2)Fuel sources:$(br)- Right-click core with crystals$(br)- Leyline Siphon function (extracts chunk mana)$(br)- Adjacent Mana Reservoir$(br)- Remote Mana Link from another circle

If mana runs out, the circle enters Flickering state (40% power), then Dormant (no effects). It never breaks — just refuel to restart.$(br2)Mana Reservoirs store 2048 CM (normal) or 8192 CM (greater) and push mana to adjacent circles automatically.
